response.overview: # Translation  The story tells of Haira Melissa who has been cast out by her family after being accused of stealing her stepsister's fiancé. She makes her way to a village to find her friend but becomes lost in heavy rain. Haira takes shelter in a hut in a banana plantation. From there, Haira's meeting with Rahhal begins. Rahhal is a village youth with higher education, having graduated from abroad. Rahhal had received a good job offer in the capital, but he sacrifices his dreams when his mother, Hajah Damiah, suffers a stroke. Rahhal makes the decision to care for his mother and manage the family's banana plantation and fish pond. Rahhal and his mother, Hajah Damiah, have been evicted from their ancestral home by Mak Long Nisah and her son Fakhril, who harbors deep resentment toward Rahhal since childhood. Fakhril has his own intentions to bring down Rahhal. Haira is moved by Rahhal's sincerity in often being concerned about her.
response.title: Saat Kau Takluk Cinta Ini
